Use your payment plan, and then 100% money back guarantee, best case, worst case, close, one-sided deal. And that's more or less it. So the real transition and the importance, especially when you're selling credit only, the main emphasis will be in that pre-sell, because what it'll do is it will frame them on the understanding that no matter what happens, they're not gonna accomplish the goal within six weeks. And they understand that it takes longer than that, and that getting the six weeks for free is pretty amazing, and then being able to take that money and then credit it forward is a pretty sick deal. And whether they hit the goal or don't hit the goal, you're gonna give them a bunch of credit either way with the $25 per pound. So it should be a no-brainer, it's more or less the exact same pitch, and all the guys who transitioned over to this have been closing at the exact same percentage.
